title: Few Years Later…
description: Minecraft, but a few years into the future. Pretty much just a bunch of super vanilla friendly mods, and such.
body:
**⚠️ Please use the latest version. Check the gallery for the recommended order of resource packs. As far as I know, I cannot set the controls in advance, so please set crawl to 'C' and reload shaders to 'U' for the intended experience.**

Is there something you want in Minecraft that you just know that Mojang will add, but are too impatient to wait? Do you wish you could just *'Few years later'* in real life? (Or, idk, just wanted some tweaks and/or cool stuff in general, that is super vanilla friendly?) Well, then this is the modpack for **YOU! :DDD**

This mod pack, F.Y.L.E., contains a bunch of vanilla friendly (sorta) mods, to give the fealing of "This is Minecraft, but like, 1.22 or something." I made absolutely nothing of the content.


<details>
<summary>What does this mod pack actually do, though?</summary>

**Glad you asked! F.Y.L.E. currently:**

- Makes Phantoms less annoying.
- Adds more weapons.
- Adds more food and crops.
- Adds mobs from the mob votes.
- Revamps most biomes, adding even more.
- Adds some mobs from Minecraft spin-offs.
- A nether terrain generation revamp.
- Makes the Ender Dragon's theme louder.
- Increases max render distance, and adds LoDs (off by default)
- Adds optimization.
- Adds 2 shaders that replicate Vibrant Visuals.
- Updates animations for both players and mobs.
- Updates textures for crops, pots, music discs, shadows, programmer art, doors, trimmed armor, and more.
- Adds variated block textures.
- Adds more pixel consistancy.
- Adds more villager sounds.
- Adds eating animations
- Revamps weather, both visually and audibly.
- Adds more particle effects, but not so many that it'll make you suffocate. I'm looking at you, pal. |: |
- Adds toggle-able armor stand arms.
- Adds more mob variants.
- Smoothens scrolling (you'll know what I mean).
- Adds cake eating sounds.
- Makes full chiseled bookshelves work with enchanting tables.
- Adds the ability to crawl without trapdoors and etc.
- Adds rooted dirt recipe.
- Adds copper fire.
- Lets bubble columns go through copper grates.
- Makes crops grow more during rains.
- Lets you change paintings my right clicking them.
- Adds potion of darkness.
- Makes elytra flight more fun. :)
- Lets you type emojis.
- Adds more tooltips for items with entities.
- Makes jungle saplings as common as every other sapling.
- Makes the xp bar different (I have no clue whats different, I kid you not, but just roll with it).
- Makes falling leaves better.
- Visually updates random server stuff I'm too lazy to describe.
- Updates horses.
- Adds slabs, stairs, and walls for concrete and terracotta.
- Adds dynamic lights.
- Updates slimes.
- Makes bubbles pop.
- Makes potions stack-able.
- Makes vines able stop growing when you right click them with shears.
- Make souls fire, uh, soul fire-er.
- Makes pigs wear a crown when named Technoblade. o7
- Makes fire charges throw-able, like wind charges.
- Makes it so some villagers can repair iron golems or heal other villagers.
- Fixes bugs.
- Adds the ability to lower the fire overlay.
- Adds emotes.
- Adds literally just WorldEdit.
- Adds more Christmas chests! :DDDDD
- Makes the ears of spotted wolves bigger.
- Makes spiders' wall crawling better.
- Makes snow fall, like on Bedrock Edition.
- Makes leaves turn white during snow, like on Bedrock Edition.
- Adds more ambient sounds.
- Adds dynamic sounds.
- Makes the bottom of the hotbar not be cutoff. Sorry for pointing that out.
- Gives armor stands arms.
- Continues programmer art.
- Increases max chat history.
- Makes block entities able to be pushed by pistons, like on Bedrock edition.
- Makes the mouse curser more Mincrafty.
- Gives you the ability to tell wandering traders to go away.
- Makes potions stackable.
- Adds a fews mobs from Minecraft Earth.
- Adds tons of sound effects.
- Adds a bar under effect icons to see how long until it wares off without going into your inventory.
- Allows you to disable the block highlight. (currently disabled)
- Revamps advancement GUI.
- Makes the Nether roof higher.
- Makes Ghasts see vertically further.
- Lets you make your Happy Ghast faster.
- Makes sleep speed up time, instead of just setting it to day. Very cool. :)
- Adds more bricks, chiseled, walls, and more for stone block sets missing them.
- Makes the Impaling Enchant work like it does on Bedrock edition.
- Makes block placing closer to Bedrock edition.
- Makes range attacking mobs' AI similar to Bedrock edition. (currently disabled)
- Makes mobs sometimes drop arrows that were shot in them.
- Makes sand wet.
- Adds sculk raido speaker system thing.
- Adds Copper Golem buffs.
- Lets you put moss carpets on Llamas.
- Attempts to make biomes transition a bit better.
- Adds blocks to display your items on.
- Smoothens F5. (play my mod pack and you will understand)
- Increases banner pattern limit to 16, instead of just 6.
- Adds puddles. :)
- Adds inventory sorting buttons.
- Adds fairly simple footprints.
- Adds illusioners.
- Variates the eye colors of villagers, and such, to tell them apart.
- Does whatever else I missed.

**And, there's even more to come! Oh boy. ._.**

</details>


**The latest version of F.Y.L.E. contains the following:**

‎ 







<details>
<summary>QnA</summary>

**What does the "E" in F.Y.L.E. mean?**

Ellipsis, aka the "…".

**Why do you keep adding mods that are disabled?**

I don't know.

**Could you update the modpack to this newer version?**

If this hasn't happened yet, unfortunately, a bunch of what I consider the main mods aren't available for said version. Not doing snapshots, btw, only full releases.

**Could you backport to 1.X?**

No. As the description says, this is meant to feel like you are playing a version that shouldn't come out for another 6 to 7 years, for example. Backporting would mean less official Mojang content and changes, and therefore going against the idea.

**Why won't my world load?**

Disable Yung's Api, and any mods depedant on it. If this doesn't work, or you don't have the mod/have it already disabled, idk lol gl ¯\_(ツ)_/¯

**Why did my world randomly crash?**

Remove Polymer Patch for Friends&Foes. If this doesn't  work, or have it already removed, once again idk lol.

**Can I use this mod pack for _?**

Do whatever ya want with this, as long as you leave credit.

**There's Chocolate, Raspberry, and even Caramel. What flavor would your mod pack be?**

Cookies & Cream. This is the Cookies & Cream mod pack.

</details>
